dbPath.label: USMD Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the USMD SQLite database. Created automatically if missing.

ragSlim.label: RAG Slim on Agent Start
ragSlim.help: Inject micro-summaries (20-30 tokens) from HNSW into agent context.

logToolCalls.label: Log Tool Calls to HNSW
logToolCalls.help: Store every tool call in Ruflo HNSW with skill tags.

trajectoryTracking.label: Trajectory Tracking
trajectoryTracking.help: Start/end SONA trajectories on agent lifecycle for self-learning.

ragTopK.label: RAG Top-K Results
ragTopK.help: Number of HNSW results to inject on agent start.
